opportunity_summary: TRIPLE MATCH: PUE 1.03, Iceotope chassis-level immersion cooling, ~2MW facility. World's first chassis-level immersion deployment. Climate-positive via district heating waste heat reuse. 14% CapEx savings, 90% rack cooling energy reduction.
confidence_reason: Iceotope/Schneider press release confirms PUE 1.03, immersion cooling, 46-100kW/rack. EcoDataCenter website confirms climate-positive status.
source_1_title: EcoDataCenter To Deploy World's First Chassis-Level Immersion Liquid Cooling
source_1_evidence_snippet: PUE of 1.03. 46kW per rack, scalable to 100kW+. 14% CapEx savings, 90% rack cooling energy reduction vs air. 2MW facility reference.
source_2_evidence_snippet: Climate-positive data center in Falun. Waste heat reuse in district heating.
notes: Climate-positive: waste heat powers district heating. Iceotope + Schneider Electric partnership. ISO certified.

opportunity_summary: Fjord-cooled mountain hall. PUE near 1.10 achieved. Offers DLC and immersion for highest densities. 8°C constant fjord water at 100m depth. Closed-loop titanium heat exchangers.
confidence_reason: Operator website confirms fjord cooling, PUE designed ≤1.2, often near 1.10. DLC and immersion cooling offered. Schneider Electric partnership.
source_1_evidence_snippet: Deep-water fjord at 8°C constant. Titanium heat exchanger. Closed-loop freshwater circuit. DLC and immersion for highest densities.
source_2_evidence_snippet: Mountain hall data center, adjacent deep-water fjord cooling source.
notes: 100% renewable Norwegian hydro power. Former NATO ammunition storage inside mountain. Gravity-fed cooling — no pumps needed for water intake.
